response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including C++ (6+ years), distributed systems, and large-scale infrastructure, meeting core qualifications. However, his recent roles lack direct cloud architecture or technical leadership experience, and his resume lacks explicit DevOps/cloud mentorship. Leadership potential is demonstrated through workshops and community contributions, but not in a traditional corporate setting.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (6+ years) with low-latency systems and high-performance computing
Proven ability to build and scale distributed systems (micro-services, real-time data processing)
Demonstrated leadership in mentorship through workshops, code katas, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit cloud architecture or DevOps leadership experience in recent roles
Limited production-level cloud infrastructure experience (preferred qualification)
Recent career gap (2025) raises questions about current availability and focus
